description: Formalize the acceptance of the 'Legacy ERP - Windows 2008' risk. Update the risk record to set the Risk Mitigation Strategy to 'Accept' and the Next Review Date to '2025-12-31'. Include the text 'Risk formally accepted by Board Directive 2025-Q1 pending cloud migration.' in the description and attach the sign-off document located at /home/ga/Documents/CEO_Risk_SignOff.pdf.
